title: Fun Titles
description: This texture pack updates the yellow subtitle under the Minecraft logo on the home screen, adding a fun and lighthearted message with an 'owo' and 'uwu' style while keeping the rest of the game unchanged.
body:
This Minecraft texture pack adds a quirky twist With a cute, 'owo' and 'uwu' vibe, this pack transforms your world with adorable textures while keeping things lighthearted and fun.


FOR EXAMPLE ;3  : 
its rat time
HOLY CRAP LOIS, IM IN MINECRAFT!!!
I Love Monster Energy :D
My Goodness Writing These Is Hard...
Give Me Cheese!
Trans Rights!
If You Can't Tell, I'm a Furry! :D
Me Formuler'
I'm Rizzed Up By Skibidi Dunne Fanum Rot :)
Me Me Big Boy
Erm Actually >8 )B
I Am So Gay Brother...
SAMSON STOP EATING THE PEACH PIT!
i Love Rats.
Fortnite Balls, I'm Gay.
You Should Skibidi Ohio In My Fanum Till I Tax.
